markdownRemark.html:
awesome Sketch

Sketch 3 has become very popular in the Design community. How much do you know about it?

A curated list of awesome Sketch videos, articles, plugins, whatever, for designers, developers, or neither.

Found something cool? Please, contribute!

--

  • Videos
  • Guides
  • Articles
    • Tips and Tricks
    • Tutorials
  • Community
  • Plugins
  • Templates & UI Kits
  • Services
  • Other

Tutorial-only
  • Sketch 3 Tutorials (25 awesome lessons for beginners)
  • Exploring Sketch plugins
  • LearnSketch channel
Process of designing dashboards, mobile apps
  • Sketch 3 Workflow playlist
  • SketchApp TV playlists
  • Sketch 3 for iOS App Design Step by Step
General screencasts
  • SketchCasts (paid mostly)

Guides

  • A Guide to Sketch
  • Sketch Shortcuts
  • Documentation
  • Switch to Sketch

Articles

Tips and Tricks
  • 11 tips for prototyping with Sketch
  • 10 Tips & Tricks for Sketch
  • 7 Tips for Sketch Users
  • 9 Sketch Features You Should be Using
  • 5 Tips to Help You Design Faster in Sketch
Tutorials

Community

  • TeamSketch, a community for Sketch designers powered by Slack
  • Google+ group
  • Facebook group
  • on Reddit
  • SketchTalk, unofficial forum
  • Sketch Hunt
  • Designer News (people talk a lot about Sketch there!)

Plugins

A plugin manager like Sketchpacks is highly recommended.

Must-have
  • Content Generatorstars4.4k
  • RenameItstars1.4k
  • Sketch Measurestars6.9k
  • Style Inventorystars1.9k
  • Dynamic Buttonstars1.1k
  • Page Switchstars67
  • Sketch Flex Layoutstars1.8k
Nice-to-have
  • Handy Toolsstars127
  • Easier.cc (Files up to 5 MB)
  • User Flowstars1.4k
  • Sketch Runner
  • Efficiencystars117
Get more plugins
  • SketchApp Resources: Plugins for Sketch
  • Sketch Plugin Directorystars3.4k
  • SketchPlugins mailing list
  • Awesome Sketch Plugins
  • Websites related to resources (see Other section).
  • In the Sketch community

Templates & UI Kits

  • Responsive Web Design Templatestars27, a template with Font-Awesome and Bootstrap UI Kit as symbols for fast web design.
  • Sketch iOS Templatesstars845, a collection of many iOS templates.
  • Teracy Wireframe Kitstars1.3k, created to help speed up your wireframing process. Includes basics UI elements for web, mobile and other devices.

Services

  • Zeplin – design, prototyping and collaboration
  • Marvel - design, prototyping and collaboration
  • Avocode – get CSS, export assets, measure and handpick colors.
  • Invision Inspect – it gives developers access to measurements, colors, and assets from a designer’s prototype
  • Sympli
  • Abstract - Version control and collaboration for Sketch files.

Other

  • (Newsletter) Sketch official newsletter
  • (Newsletter) Sketch tricks
  • (Resources) SketchApp Resources
  • (Resources) SketchLand
  • (Resources) SketchResources
  • (Resources) Sketchapp TV
  • (Resources) Sketch Repo
  • SketchApp Rocks
  • SketchTips, a blog about Sketch
  • sketch-tricks on Medium

Keep up to date!

Sketch has got a fast-growing community. Joining them (see Community section ↑), following their blog and subscribing to their newsletter are the best ways to keep up to date so far.
